what: Inline cktile_moe_stage1 for ksplit path: pre-allocate tmp_out (torch.zeros) and out buffers, call aiter.moe_cktile2stages_gemm1 + aiter.silu_and_mul directly to avoid 2 tensor allocations per call on 3/7 shapes
why: cktile_moe_stage1 creates new torch.empty(out) and torch.zeros(tmp_out) on every call, overwriting passed-in pre-allocated buffer. Inlining with persistent buffers eliminates ~2-3µs allocation overhead per shape
